ConnectionStrings._comment_pooler: Using Supabase pooler Port 6543 (Transaction mode) - better for connection pooling. Reduced max pool size to 10 to avoid 'max clients reached' error.
ConnectionStrings._comment_supabase: Transaction mode (Port 6543) handles connections better than Session mode (Port 5432). Set Minimum Pool Size=0 to release connections when idle.

SmtpSettings._comment: Gmail SMTP for development. Using App Password for authentication.

RedisSettings._comment: Set Enabled=true and provide Upstash Redis connection string to enable Redis caching in development. When Enabled=false, application uses database-only fallback mode.

TwilioSettings._comment: Development mode - SMS messages will be logged but not sent. Set Enabled=true with real credentials to test SMS delivery.
